title: Rules of Wudu
summary: The method of purifying the body before prayer.
steps: Make the intention (niyyah) in the heart
Say "Bismillah"
Wash both hands up to the wrists three times
Rinse the mouth (or use miswak) three times
Sniff water into the nose and blow it out three times
Wash the entire face three times (hairline to chin, ear to ear)
Wash both arms up to and including the elbows three times (right first)
Wipe (masah) the head once
Wipe both ears
Wash both feet up to and including the ankles three times (right first)

title: Method of Salah
summary: The step-by-step way the five daily prayers are performed.
steps: Face the Qiblah and make the intention
Say the Takbeer al-Ihram ("Allahu Akbar") to begin
Recite the opening supplication, seeking refuge, and Bismillah
Recite Surah al-Fatihah and another surah
Perform Ruku (bowing) while glorifying Allah
Rise from Ruku and stand straight
Perform Sujood (prostration) twice, sitting briefly in between
Repeat this sequence for each rak'ah
In the final sitting, recite Tashahhud, Durood, and supplications
End the prayer with Taslim (salam)

title: Nullifiers of Salah
summary: Actions and situations that invalidate the prayer.
steps: Deliberately speaking
Laughing out loud
Losing wudu
Turning the chest away from the Qiblah
Eating or drinking during the prayer
Excessive continuous movement
Exposure of the parts of the body required to be covered (satr)
